chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-781 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 3246/23 3.For hearing of main case 27-03-2025 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-Pakistan Railways. **** Counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
